message:
fix(history): omit --allow-external-jsonl from restore hint when DB location already implies the external JSONL target

restore_next_step always emitted --allow-external-jsonl for any JSONL
path outside .beads/, even when the path was a natural sibling of an
externally-configured DB (which already implicitly permits it). The
command_db_path resolved from resolve_paths_without_env_jsonl is now
threaded through restore_backup and consulted via
implicit_external_jsonl_allowed before appending the flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
